# terrible_community_general_mattermost (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String) Mattermost webhook API key. Log into your Mattermost site, go to Menu -> Integration -> Incoming Webhook -> Add Incoming Webhook. This gives you a full URL. `api_key` is the last part. http://mattermost.example.com/hooks/API_KEY.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `url` (String) Mattermost URL (for example `http://mattermost.yourcompany.com`).

### Optional

- `attachments` (String) Define a list of attachments. For more information, see https://developers.mattermost.com/integrate/admin-guide/admin-message-attachments/. Required when `text` is not set.
- `channel` (String) Channel to send the message to. If absent, the message goes to the channel selected for the `api_key`.
- `icon_url` (String) URL for the message sender's icon.
- `priority` (String) Set a priority for the message.
- `text` (String) Text to send. Note that the module does not handle escaping characters. Required when `attachments` is not set.
- `username` (String) This is the sender of the message (Username Override need to be enabled by mattermost admin, see mattermost doc).
- `validate_certs` (Boolean) If `false`, SSL certificates are not validated. This should only be used on personally controlled sites using self-signed certificates.

### Read-Only

- `payload` (String) Mattermost payload.
- `webhook_url` (String) URL the webhook is sent to.
